Docs GitHub

Develop fast.
Scale forever.

The most productive Full-Stack web framework in Rust. Built for developer happiness.

Learn how to begin
⚡

Extremely Fast

Built on Tokio and Axum. Enjoy the insane speed of Rust without giving up a high-level API.

🔋

Batteries Included

ORM, Authentication, Background Jobs, Mailer, Cache, and WebSocket all built-in and ready to use.

🧠

AI-Native

Designed from the ground up to be manipulated by AI Agents. Predictable, clear, and strongly typed architecture.

Welcome to Rullst Framework!

Rullst is an extremely fast, modular, and friendly Full-Stack web framework for Rust. It includes everything you need to take your application from scratch to production without headaches.

"Pragmatic, Built for Developer Happiness, and Production-Ready."

Where to start?

Go to Getting Started

Why Rullst?

  • 🚀 Extreme Speed: Built in Rust, using tokio and axum.
  • 🧩 Wasm Islands: Write client-side components in Rust.
  • 📦 Batteries Included: ORM (rust-eloquent), Jobs, Mail, Scheduler, Cache.
  • 🛡️ Strong Typing: Compile-time checking.
